sourcesContent:
// src/pages/admin/AdminDashboard.js import React, { useState } from "react"; import { Paper, Typography, Table, TableHead, TableBody, TableRow, TableCell, Box, } from "@mui/material"; export default function AdminDashboard() { const [overview] = useState({ users: 10, riders: 5, captains: 4, pendingCaptains: 1, rides: 7, }); const [rides] = useState([ { _id: "1", riderId: { fullName: "John Doe" }, captainId: { fullName: "Captain A" }, pickup: "Location A", drop: "Location B", fare: 100, status: "Completed", }, { _id: "2", riderId: { fullName: "Jane Smith" }, captainId: { fullName: "Captain B" }, pickup: "Location C", drop: "Location D", fare: 150, status: "Pending", }, // Add more static rides if needed ]); return ( Admin Dashboard Users: {overview.users} Riders: {overview.riders} Approved Captains: {overview.captains} Pending Captains: {overview.pendingCaptains} Total Rides: {overview.rides} Recent Rides Rider Captain Pickup Drop Fare Status {rides.length === 0 ? ( No rides found ) : ( rides.map((ride) => ( {ride.riderId?.fullName || "-"} {ride.captainId?.fullName || "-"} {ride.pickup} {ride.drop} {ride.fare} {ride.status} )) )}
); }
